features.name: /safari-status skill: SKILL.md + justfile checking all 7 REST services + Safari sessions, returns status table
/social-inbox skill: reads unread DMs from all 4 platforms, categorizes hot_lead/needs_reply/spam/follow_up_pending, drafts replies
/dm-campaign skill: CRMLite dedup check + profile fetch + ai_generate_dm + batch approval gate + send with delay
/upwork-hunt skill: search jobs + score vs ICP + generate proposals for top 5 + approval gate + submit
/social-research skill: cross-platform prospect brief from handle/name across LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter
/comment-sweep skill: scrape post comments, CRMLite score each commenter, surface top leads, optionally open DM threads
